_comment: v4.4.6 REPL replay battery — checks user-facing surface text after Codex 2026-04-27 caught two defects (CheckContradiction renderer, AskAge self-recall) that the cognitive_eval harness missed because the trace signals were correct, only the rendered text was wrong. Complementary to cognitive_dialog_dataset.json: cognitive eval asserts on trace fields (action / intent / epistemic / belief), this asserts on what the user actually sees. Per CONTRIBUTING.md, every surface-text defect ships with at least one new dialog here.

dialogs.description: User introduces self by name; the reply must surface the name back so the user sees they were heard.

v4.4.9 PROMOTED: user states their city, reply surfaces the canonical name. The pre-v4.4.6 «түсіндім» bare variant at index 0 of `statement_of_location` was rewritten in v4.4.9 to «{city} екен, түсіндім» so every variant interpolates `{city}`. The dialog is now canonical and locks the slot-echo invariant against future regressions.

v4.4.9 PROMOTED: user states their age, reply surfaces the number. Pre-v4.4.6 the `statement_of_age` family had two bare variants («жақсы жас», «қуатты кезеңіңіз») that didn't echo `{age}`. v4.4.9 rewrote them as «{age} — жақсы жас» / «{age} — қуатты кезеңіңіз» so every variant interpolates the number.

v4.4.9 PROMOTED: user states profession, reply surfaces the role. Pre-v4.4.6 the `statement_of_occupation` family had two bare variants («түсіндім», «еңбегіңізге сәттілік») that didn't echo `{occupation}`. v4.4.9 rewrote them as «{occupation} екен, түсіндім» / «{occupation} еңбегіңізге сәттілік».

v4.4.9-tightened: after introducing a name, asking `менің атым кім?` must return the stored name AND must NOT echo the question word `кім` as if it were a name (the latter half locks v4.4.9's interrogative-pronoun guard in place — pre-v4.4.9 the reply contained both `Дәулет` and `Кім` as a phantom-contradiction clarifying question, so the dialog passed the substring check by accident).

v4.4.9-tightened: after stating a city, asking `мен қайда тұрамын?` must surface the stored city via `ask_location.with_known_user`. Both turns now carry slot-echo assertions — the v4.4.9 `statement_of_location` rewrite made the setup turn assertable.

v4.4.5 regression — `менің жасым қанша?` after `менің жасым 40` was misclassified as StatementOfAge { years: None } pre-v4.4.5; the reply happened to surface 40 only because statement_of_age interpolates session.age. Post-v4.4.5 this routes to AskAge / ask_age.with_known_user. v4.4.9-tightened: setup turn now carries an `age` slot-echo assertion (the statement_of_age family rewrite made it assertable).
After stating occupation, the system must be able to surface it on a follow-up self-question via `ask_occupation.with_known_user`.

v4.4.5 (Codex 2026-04-27 REPL): two contradictory city statements must produce a clarifying question that names BOTH candidates. Pre-v4.4.5 the renderer fell through to statement_of_location and emitted «Алматыда екеніңізді есте сақтаймын» — committing to one of the contested values. The `output_not_contains_lower` assertion on turn 1 locks the bug closed. v4.4.9-tightened: setup turn (turn 0) now carries a `city` slot-echo assertion.
v4.4.0 dismissal: after a contradiction is logged, replying `білмеймін` clears both candidates from belief and the reply must acknowledge the dismissal — no statement-of-* confirmation.
v4.4.0 dismissal alternative trigger: `екеуі де жоқ` after the conflict prompt; same effect as `білмеймін`.
v4.3.4: `сен кімсің` must surface adam's identity, including either the abbreviation NLM or the full name Nano Language Model.
v4.3.4 Creator aspect: `сені кім жасады` must surface the creator's surname.
v4.3.4 Birthdate aspect: `қашан пайда болдың` must surface the canonical date 2026-04-07.
v4.3.4 Architecture aspect: `сенің ерекшелігің не` must mention `архитектур`.
v4.3.0 canonical geography: asking about Қазақстан must surface a substantive reply (not a refusal), since geography_kz.jsonl carries curated entries.
v4.3.5 famous Kazakhs: asking about Әуезов via `туралы` marker must surface a substantive reply, since kz_literature.jsonl carries the curated entry.
Asking about an unknown proper noun via `туралы` should produce a tentative / clarifying reply that surfaces the topic itself, not a confident-sounding fabrication.
Bare `сәлем` must return a greeting, not a refusal or error.
`рахмет` returns a non-empty social acknowledgement.
`кешіріңіз` returns a non-empty social acknowledgement, not a refusal.
Empty / whitespace input must not crash and must produce a graceful refusal or fallback, not a confident statement.
Pure punctuation input is gracefully rejected.
v4.3.1 person canonicalisation: lowercase / mixed-case name forms collapse to canonical title-cased form when echoed back.
v4.3.2 phantom-city fix: `мен жасанды интеллектпен айналысамын` must NOT log a phantom city `Жасанды`. The reply should not commit to any city; subsequent topic turn must work normally.

v4.3.5 topic_marker_hint: `Жазушы Мүсірепов туралы не білесіз?` must extract `Мүсірепов` (proper noun before `туралы`) as the topic, not `жазушы` (common noun won pre-v4.3.5). The reply surfaces the proper noun.

v4.3.3: compound `А, сен кімсің және атың кім?` after a name introduction must route to AskAboutSystem (the pronoun-led `сен кімсің` part wins), so adam introduces itself rather than echoing the user's name.

turns.user: А, сен кімсің және атың кім?

dialogs.description: Asking about the same topic twice in a row must not produce a regressive reply; both turns surface a substantive answer.

A multi-slot profile build: name, age, city all in sequence. v4.4.9-tightened: every turn now asserts on its own slot echo (the statement_of_age + statement_of_location rewrite removed the bare variants that made age/city turns unassertable pre-v4.4.9).

v4.4.9 explicit lock for the bug REPL replay surfaced in v4.4.6 and v4.4.8 deferred. Pre-v4.4.9 `менің атым кім?` parsed as `StatementOfName { name: Кім }` because `detect_statement_of_name`'s pattern 1 (`атым X`) blindly grabbed the next token. Once a real name was already stored, this logged a phantom `BeliefConflict` (Дәулет vs Кім) and emitted a clarifying-question reply naming both. Post-v4.4.9: interrogative-pronoun guard in `detect_statement_of_name` + 1sg-self-recall extension to `detect_ask_name` route this to `Intent::AskName` and the `ask_name.with_known_user` template family.

v4.4.10 (2026-04-28 real-REPL transcript): `Танысайық.` («let's get acquainted») must trigger `greeting.intro_proposal` and surface adam's name. Pre-v4.4.10 the form fell through every greeting branch and landed on the safe-fallback refusal `қайта айтыңызшы`. The new `GreetingKind::IntroProposal` variant + `greeting.intro_proposal` template family routes this correctly.

v4.4.10 (2026-04-28 real-REPL transcript): `Қазақстанда қанша облыс бар?` must surface a fact containing `17`. Pre-v4.4.10 the system had no fact about oblast count and regurgitated the basic «Қазақстан — Орталық Азиядағы ел». v4.4.10 authored 17 oblast entries + a `қазақстан has_quantity облыс` fact with surface text «Қазақстанда 17 облыс бар.».

v4.4.10 (2026-04-28 real-REPL transcript): `Қысқасы, сен ештеңе білмейсің.` must NOT surface a proverb about wives («Әйеліммен кеңессем ештеңе етпей ме?»). Pre-v4.4.10 the FST returned root `қысқа` and retrieval matched a tangential proverb keyed on `қысқа`. NOT_A_TOPIC additions for `қысқа` + `ештеңе` block the misfire. Acceptable downstream behaviour: a Tentative refusal or a generic acknowledgement, but no proverb output.

v4.4.11 (closes v4.4.10 carry-forward): `Қазақстан аймақтарының атауларын білесіз бе?` — input-morpheme-overlap reranker now picks the `қазақстан related_to аймақтар тізімі` fact (`raw_text`: «Қазақстанның аймақтары — 17 облыс пен 3 республикалық маңызы бар қала.») over the most-central «Қазақстан — Орталық Азиядағы ел» IsA fact. Pre-v4.4.11 the predicate-rank tier (IsA=0, RelatedTo=6) made IsA always win regardless of query content.

v4.4.11: `Қазақстанда қандай көлдер бар?` surfaces the lakes list-summary fact. The reranker scores «көлдер» as a content-token match against the fact's `raw_text` («Қазақстандағы ірі көлдер мен теңіздер: Балқаш, Каспий, Арал, Зайсан, Алакөл, Тенгіз, Маркакөл.»), and the v4.4.11 RelatedTo renderer surfaces `raw_text` because the object root «көлдер тізімі» contains «тізім».

v4.4.11: `Қазақстанда қандай таулар бар?` surfaces the mountains list-summary fact (raw_text: «Қазақстандағы ірі тау жоталары: Алтай, Тянь-Шань, Жетісу Алатауы, Қаратау, Ұлытау; биік шыңы — Хан Тәңірі.»). Note: the alternate phrasing `Қазақстандағы таулар қандай?` does NOT yet route correctly — the FST stumbles on the compound `-дағы` suffix and `қазақстандағы` is not recognised as a topic. Tracked for a future FST-coverage patch.
v4.4.11: `Қазақстанда қандай шөлдер бар?` surfaces the deserts list-summary fact.

v4.4.10 multi-turn introduction flow mirroring the 2026-04-28 real-REPL transcript opening: greeting → wellbeing → intro proposal → name introduction. All four turns must produce non-refusal replies that progress the dialog.

v4.1.0 belief revision: explicit self-correction `жоқ, мен Алматыда тұрамын` after a city statement updates the active fact. Final reply surfaces the corrected city via the belief_revision template family which interpolates `{new_value}` deterministically.
